---
title: Portraits
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779790143/portraitsannees50_nt3g44.png
description: Portraits de personnages des années 1950
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2026-05-24
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779790143/portraitsannees50_nt3g44.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
